measurements.headAspectRatio: outer head width divided by outer head height
measurements.headToBodyRatio: outer head height divided by core body height
measurements.eyeSpacingRatio: eye center distance divided by outer head width
measurements.eyeVerticalRatio: head-top to eye-center distance divided by outer head height
measurements.mouthVerticalRatio: head-top to mouth-anchor distance divided by outer head height
measurements.antennaHeightRatio: head-top to antenna-tip-top distance divided by outer head height
